rewards.RewardDescription:
Enjoy a complimentary cruise from Whittier, Alaska and Vancouver, Canada to Alaska! Sail now for 7 days on select sailings through September 14, 2026 on The Norwegian Jade. Alaska reveals itself best from the water, and on an NCL cruise, each day begins with a new horizon and the freedom to experience it your way. Wake up to breathtaking views that set the stage for the day's adventures. Whether that’s hiking a glacier, kayaking through pristine waters, learning about history, or meeting the “celebrities” of Alaskan dog sledding, every moment feels hands-on, alive, and impossible to replicate. When the day winds down, the scenery doesn’t stop. Share stories over a cocktail in the Observation Lounge as whales surface in the distance, or settle in for dinner on The Waterfront, where the views steal the show. On an NCL Alaska cruise, the journey is just as memorable as the destination — with space for thrill-seekers, nature lovers, and everyone in between.

Limited to one Norwegian Cruise Line in-app reward purchase every 90 days. Reservations must be made within 30 days of the reward purchase date or June 30, 2026, whichever occurs first.

rewards.RewardPageTitle: $1,000 Holiday Dollars Off Your Next Cruise
rewards.RewardDescription: Give yourself the ultimate holiday treat — set sail with Norwegian Cruise Line and enjoy $1,000 off your dream vacation.
rewards.PointHistoryNote: I purchased this deal on 22 Nov 2025 for 500k points, but on Black Friday (28 Nov) it dropped to 250k points.
